title: Moonlight Theme | Iris Shaders
description: This set of resources changes the interface textures associated with the 'Iris Shaders' mod.
body:
![art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1611e135160f58a38e7917d6fd2a4ff368d01b5.png)  
# About the resource pack:

This resource pack changes the textures of the interface elements for the "Iris Shaders" mod, making them white, softer, and easier on the eyes.

Suitable for fans of white interface elements!

Need: Iris Shaders.

# Note:

Please do not install this resource pack together with other similar ones to avoid conflicts.
